403.title: You don't have access to this area
403.body: Your account doesn't have permission to view this. If you think this is a mistake, please contact your administrator.

404.title: Page not found
404.body: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or may have moved.

419.title: Your session expired
419.body: For your security your session timed out. Please sign in again and retry.

503.title: Temporarily unavailable
503.body: CareOS is briefly down for maintenance. Please try again in a moment.

portalLockout.title: Your portal access has been withdrawn
portalLockout.body: Your consent to use the patient portal was withdrawn, so you've been signed out. Please contact the practice if you'd like to use the portal again.

generic.title: Something went wrong
generic.body: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

settings.title: Practice settings
settings.subtitle: Configure your practice. The server enforces every value — this page only reflects it.

profile.title: Practice profile
profile.subtitle: The details shown on invoices, the portal and public booking.
profile.name: Practice name

identity.title: Identity & plan
identity.subtitle: Fixed identifiers — the booking slug and region cannot change; status and plan are managed for you.

billing.title: Billing identity & currency
billing.subtitle: Shown on invoices and used across billing, reporting and the dashboard.

access.title: Roles & access
access.subtitle: Manage who can do what in your practice.

gaps.title: Not yet configurable
gaps.subtitle: On the roadmap — these have no backend to save to yet.
gaps.items: Adding resources (rooms/chairs) to a branch · Feature toggles · Plan & subscription

roles.title: Roles & access
roles.subtitle: Assign a built-in role to each member. Roles are fixed templates — the server enforces exactly what each grants.

flash.unchanged: That member already has this role.

roles.lastAdmin: Can't change this — it would leave the practice with no organisation admin.

team.title: Team
team.subtitle: Each member's current role. Assigning a new role replaces the current one.

catalog.title: What each role grants
catalog.subtitle: Read-only — the tested permission set for every role template.

kiosk.title: Check in
kiosk.verifyHint: Please confirm your details to check in.
kiosk.name: Full name
kiosk.notFound: We couldn't find your appointment. Please see reception.
kiosk.tooMany: Too many attempts. Please see reception.
kiosk.doneHint: Please take a seat — we'll call you shortly.

kioskAdmin.title: Kiosk devices
kioskAdmin.subtitle: Provision a check-in kiosk for a branch. The token is shown once.
kioskAdmin.name: Device name
kioskAdmin.issuedHint: Open this URL on the kiosk device now — it will not be shown again.

index.title: Patient imports
index.subtitle: Migrate patients from a CSV export of your old system.

upload.title: Import patients from CSV
upload.subtitle: Upload a CSV, map its columns, run a dry-run, then commit.
upload.mapHint: Map each CSV column to a CareOS patient field. Unmapped columns are ignored. First name, last name and date of birth are required.
upload.dryRunNote: The dry-run validates every row and detects duplicates. Nothing is written to patients until you commit.

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Staff and administrator access.
login.invalid: Those credentials do not match our records.

twoFactor.challengeSubtitle: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.
twoFactor.enrollSubtitle: Two-factor authentication is required for every account. Scan the QR code with your authenticator app, then confirm the generated code.
twoFactor.enrollStep1: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app.
twoFactor.recoveryCodesHint: Store these codes somewhere safe. Each can be used once if you lose your device.

app.title: Workspace
app.empty: Your tools will appear here as the platform is built out.
app.glancePending: Live figures appear here once your day is connected.
app.scheduleEmpty: Nothing scheduled yet — quick-book the day's first appointment.
app.scheduleGoBoard: Open the day-board to see and manage today's schedule.

admin.title: Platform administration
admin.empty: Tenant and platform controls will appear here.
admin.scopeNote: Tenant-app links in this shared shell act only when impersonating a tenant.
admin.tenantsEmpty: Tenant management appears here once the platform console is wired.

index.title: Patients
index.subtitle: Find a record by name or date of birth.
index.searchHint: Full-text match on first and family name · date of birth matches exactly · results cap at 25.

register.title: Register a new patient
register.subtitle: Steps are freely clickable — everything validates on final submit.
register.duplicatesHint: The identity you entered closely matches records already in this practice.
register.notADuplicate: This is a new patient — continue
register.duplicateDiscardHint: Opening a profile leaves the wizard; entered data is discarded.

show.grantHint: Locks the latest active template version server-side; both fields required.
show.accessHint: Read-only, factual, and visible to any patient.view user — who accessed this record.

dayBoard.title: Day-board
dayBoard.subtitle: Branch agenda by resource.
dayBoard.quickBookHint: Find a free slot and book through the safe booking path.

series.title: Recurring appointment
series.subtitle: Book a repeating clinic appointment in one action.
series.hint: Pick a patient, service and resource above, then set the recurrence and preview the dates. Free slots are booked; conflicts are reported for you to resolve.

waitlist.title: Waitlist auto-fill
waitlist.subtitle: When a slot frees, offer it to a matching waitlisted patient in one click.

public.title: Book an appointment
public.emergencyNotice: This booking form is not for emergencies. For urgent help, contact local emergency services.
public.pickTimeHint: Times come from the practice's live calendar.
public.detailsHint: Just enough to hold your appointment.
public.dedupeNote: If you've been here before, we'll match you to your existing record — no duplicate is created.

snippets.title: Text snippets
snippets.subtitle: Reusable dot-phrases you can expand while writing notes. Personal are private to you; shared are tenant-wide.
snippets.placeholdersHint: These non-clinical placeholders are filled in when a snippet is inserted. Nothing else is substituted.
snippets.name: Title

ordersReview.title: Orders to review
ordersReview.subtitle: Resulted orders awaiting a clinician's review. Results are shown as entered.

orderableItems.title: Orderable items
orderableItems.subtitle: Your practice's own list of orderable tests and studies. No licensed catalog is bundled.
orderableItems.name: Name

note.title: SOAP note
note.signModalBody: Corrections afterwards happen only as visible amendments.
note.amendHint: Creates a fresh editable version prefilled from the signed note. The original stays exactly as signed.

aiSummary.title: Chart summary
aiSummary.extractive: Extractive only — every line carries its source; interpretive requests are refused.

login.title: Patient portal sign in
login.failed: Those credentials do not match our records.

home.balanceNote: For information only — payment is handled at the practice.

appointments.subtitle: Book a visit or change an upcoming one.
appointments.empty: Nothing booked yet — pick a time whenever you're ready.
appointments.bookingIntro: Booked as you — no details to re-enter.
appointments.slotsEmpty: No free times that day — try another date.
appointments.slotsCapNote: Up to 12 free times per day.
appointments.cancelConfirm: Cancel this appointment? The time goes back to the practice right away.
appointments.withinWindow: Within {hours} hours of the start — please call the practice to cancel.
appointments.cancelHint: Appointments can be cancelled online up to {hours} hours before the start — within that window, please call the practice.

checkIn.contactHint: Keep your phone, email and address up to date.

documents.title: Your documents
documents.subtitle: Only what the practice has shared with you appears here — nothing else from your record.
documents.empty: No documents have been shared with you.
documents.footer: Each download is recorded for your safety, and files come straight from the practice — never a public link.

messages.title: Your messages
messages.subtitle: Write to the practice here — we usually reply within one working day.
messages.onlyYours: Only your own conversations appear here.
messages.noSelection: Choose a conversation on the left.
messages.closedNote: This conversation is closed — the practice will open a new one if anything else comes up.
messages.urgentNote: For anything urgent please call the practice — this inbox is checked during opening hours.

invoices.title: Your invoices
invoices.subtitle: Your issued invoices — download a PDF anytime.
invoices.filterNote: Filters this list only — your open balance stays the full total.
invoices.footer: Payment is handled at the practice — please settle open invoices there or by bank transfer using the reference on your PDF.

consents.title: Your consents
consents.subtitle: What you've agreed to — and how to change your mind. Withdrawing takes effect immediately and is recorded with your reason.
consents.withdrawWarning: Withdrawing takes effect immediately and is recorded with your reason.
consents.withdrawWarningStrong: Please be sure. Withdrawing portal access signs you out immediately — you won't be able to sign back in, see documents, or message the practice here. The practice can invite you again later.

scope.commsEmail: Get email updates about your care
scope.documentsRead: See documents the practice shares with you
scope.researchShare: Share anonymised data with approved research projects

telehealth.title: Video visits
telehealth.subtitle: Join from anywhere quiet and private. This call is not recorded.
telehealth.empty: No video visit is scheduled right now.
telehealth.joined: Your join code is ready. It expires shortly — use it now.
telehealth.notice: This video visit is not recorded.
telehealth.footer: Only sessions the practice has opened appear here. The join link is created the moment you tap Join and is never stored — if you close the call, just tap Join again.

inbox.title: Inbox
inbox.subtitle: Patient messages and internal threads.
inbox.listNote: Newest first · capped at 100 · unread derived per user.
inbox.internalChip: Internal — not visible to the patient
inbox.contextNote: Context shows for patient threads only.
inbox.noSelection: Select a thread to read it.

aiDraft.title: AI-assisted draft — nothing sends without you
aiDraft.footnote: Sends as you · marked ai-assisted · re-grounded server-side.

dispatch.title: Dispatch
dispatch.subtitle: Assign planned visits to nurse resources.
dispatch.softWarningTitle: Assigned with warnings — the nurse lacks a soft-required competency:

competencies.title: Nurse competencies
competencies.subtitle: Define your own competencies, set each one's enforcement, and grant them to nurses.
competencies.name: Name

actions.title: Actions
actions.creditReasonPlaceholder: Why is this invoice being credited?
actions.viewOnly: You have view-only access to billing.

aging.title: Accounts receivable
aging.footnote: Buckets reflect open balances by days since the invoice due date. Amounts are factual and are not adjusted for expected collectability.

payments.title: Payments
payments.subtitle: {count} payment | {count} payments
payments.recordHint: Record money already received and, if you like, apply it to an invoice. CareOS does not process cards — the desk records the result.
payments.noPsp: This records a payment already received (bank transfer, cash, or a card taken at the desk). There is no online card processing.
payments.noAllocations: This payment is not applied to any invoice yet.
payments.allocationRejected: The payment was recorded, but the allocation was not applied:

newInvoice.title: New invoice
newInvoice.subtitle: Assemble an invoice from a patient's validated charges and issue it.
newInvoice.noneToInvoice: No validated, un-invoiced charges to bill.
newInvoice.totalNote: The invoice total, VAT, and number are set by the billing engine when you issue.

dunning.title: Dunning
dunning.subtitle: {count} overdue invoice with an open balance | {count} overdue invoices with an open balance
dunning.footnote: Sending reminders runs the tested dunning policy for every overdue invoice as of today; re-running the same day changes nothing. Reminders are a legal communication and are not consent-gated.

reporting.title: Practice reporting
reporting.footnote: Every figure is a factual count, sum, or rate for the selected period from the tested reporting service. Financial figures appear only with billing access.

branchesAdmin.title: Branches
branchesAdmin.subtitle: Manage your locations, their opening hours and status.

errors.codeTaken: That branch code is already in use.
errors.hasAppointments: Cannot deactivate — this branch has {count} upcoming appointment. Reassign or cancel it first. | Cannot deactivate — this branch has {count} upcoming appointments. Reassign or cancel them first.
errors.invalidWindow: Each open day needs an opening time before its closing time.

create.title: Add a branch
create.subtitle: A new active branch is immediately selectable for booking.

list.title: Your branches
list.noResources: No resources yet — add a room, chair or vehicle below so this branch can be booked.

hours.title: Opening hours
hours.subtitle: Bookable times are bounded by these hours. A branch with none set uses the default 07:00–19:00.

resources.title: Bookable resources
resources.subtitle: Rooms, chairs or vehicles appointments book against. A new active resource is immediately bookable; a deactivated one drops out of scheduling.
resources.empty: No resources yet — add a room, chair or vehicle below so this branch can be booked.
resources.name: Resource name
resources.blocked: Cannot deactivate — this resource still has upcoming appointments. Reassign or cancel them first.
resources.hasAppointments: {count} upcoming appointment — reassign or cancel first | {count} upcoming appointments — reassign or cancel first

governance.title: Governance & oversight
governance.subtitle: The tenant's audit, integrity, reconciliation and AI posture — read only, from the tested checks.

flash.chain_broken: Audit chain re-verified: a break was detected. See the chain card for the offending row.

chain.title: Audit chain
chain.cardSubtitle: The append-only hash chain, verified by replay. 'Verify now' re-runs the existing check and changes nothing.

reconcile.title: Reconciliation
reconcile.cardSubtitle: The most recent run of the launch-blocker reconciliation monitor.
reconcile.alarm: A reconciliation alarm is set for a period that has not since passed. Billing must reconcile to the unit before real invoicing.

ai.title: AI interactions
ai.cardSubtitle: Interaction outcomes and cost from the append-only ledger over the last {days} days.
ai.none: No AI interactions in this window.

kill.title: AI kill switches
kill.subtitle: Features an admin has disabled fail-closed.

security.title: Security-relevant events
security.subtitle: Role changes, overrides and other sensitive audit actions.

activity.title: Governance activity
activity.note: Recent audit events — append-only, displayed and never editable.

aiQueue.title: AI approval queue
aiQueue.subtitle: AI actions awaiting human approval. Approve or reject each — it runs only through the tested path, and the caps still bind.
aiQueue.empty: No AI actions are awaiting review.

flash.approved: Action approved and executed through the existing path.

actions.noPermission: You do not hold the permission this tool requires, so you cannot review this action.

resolved.title: Recently resolved
resolved.subtitle: The latest approved and rejected actions (read-only).

kb.title: Knowledge base
kb.subtitle: The articles the Front-Desk agent answers patient questions from. Curate the content here; the agent's grounding and refusals are unchanged.
kb.grounding: The Front-Desk agent grounds its answers only on ACTIVE articles, always with a citation, and refuses medical questions. Deactivating an article removes it from what the agent can answer from.

flash.activated: Article activated — the agent can ground on it again.
flash.deactivated: Article deactivated — the agent no longer grounds on it.

new.title: New article
new.subtitle: A new active article is immediately available to the agent.

list.title: Articles
list.subtitle: Active articles are the agent's source; inactive ones are kept but not grounded on.

staffTelehealth.title: Telehealth
staffTelehealth.subtitle: Your active and upcoming video visits. Join issues a short-lived, single-use token — media never touches CareOS.
staffTelehealth.notRecorded: None of these calls are recorded. The video room is not the clinical record — document the visit in a note like any other encounter.
staffTelehealth.joined: Token issued — connecting you to the video room. This call is not recorded.
staffTelehealth.empty: You have no active or upcoming telehealth sessions.

dental.title: Odontogram
dental.readOnly: You can view the chart but not record — dental.chart required.
dental.clickHint: Click a tooth to inspect it and record what you observe.

legend.title: Chart key
legend.note: Colour marks the condition the dentist charted — not its severity. Nothing here is scored, graded, or flagged.

dental.selectPrompt: Select a tooth to see its charted conditions and history.
dental.reasonPlaceholder: Reason, if correcting a prior record (optional)
dental.noHistory: No charting history for this tooth.

perform.title: Perform a procedure
perform.hint: Records the procedure, captures the charge, and updates the chart — in one action.

feeSchedule.title: Fee schedule
feeSchedule.subtitle: Your own dental procedure list and fees. Each procedure is a billable item — charging it runs through the standard billing engine (invoice, reconciliation, dunning). You author your own codes and fees; nothing licensed is bundled.

flash.updated: Procedure updated. Past charges keep the fee they were captured at.
flash.seeded: Starter template added. Edit the codes and fees to match your practice.

list.title: Procedures
list.subtitle: Active procedures are chargeable; a fee edit never changes a charge already captured.
list.empty: No procedures yet. Add your own, or start from a generic template.

feeSchedule.name: Name
feeSchedule.toothScopedHint: Tooth-scoped — this procedure applies to a specific tooth/surface (e.g. a filling)

new.title: Add a procedure
new.subtitle: Your own code and fee — a new active procedure is immediately chargeable.

treatmentPlan.title: Treatment plans
treatmentPlan.subtitle: Proposed procedures grouped into phases, with an estimate from your fee schedule. You author the plan; the patient accepts it. Estimating is not billing — a procedure is charged only when it's performed.

flash.performed: Procedure recorded and charged; the plan item is marked done.

treatmentPlan.fenceNote: You author this plan — nothing is auto-suggested. Estimates come from your fee schedule.
treatmentPlan.noProcedures: Add procedures to your fee schedule first.

portalTreatmentPlan.title: Treatment plan
portalTreatmentPlan.subtitle: The treatment your dental team has proposed, with an estimate. This is an estimate — your dentist will confirm costs.
portalTreatmentPlan.empty: You have no treatment plans yet.
